code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sorted = true
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        let value = cur * sign
        if has_prev and value < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = value
        has_prev = true
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_num
    let value = cur * sign
    if has_prev and value < prev
      sorted = false
    end
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
